About & Contact

Learn more about Bs DotNet and get in touch.

About This Site

Bs DotNet is a personal technology blog focused on sharing knowledge and insights about modern software development, artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, and developer tools.

The goal is to provide clear, practical, and in-depth technical content for developers and technology enthusiasts.

About the Author

I’m a software developer and technology enthusiast passionate about .NET, Python, AI, and cybersecurity. I write about the tools, patterns, and practices that make developers more effective.

Topics Covered

  • .NET Development — C#, ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework, and the .NET ecosystem
  • Python — Scripting, automation, data analysis, and AI/ML
  • Artificial Intelligence — Machine learning, LLMs, and practical AI applications
  • Cybersecurity — Security research, defensive strategies, and secure coding
  • Developer Tools — Productivity tools, workflows, and open-source projects
